infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely access FamilyVault without typing your password.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Upload photos from your library to share with your family.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take photos directly to upload to FamilyVault.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FamilyVault to access your photos for uploading.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FamilyVault to use your camera to take photos.
